summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mismatch Validation feature in Light Picking. All backend tests passed (6/6). Frontend UI verified: scanning non-conforming product shows 'Produit non conforme' dialog with message, scanned product description, and 'Non, annuler'/'Oui, ajouter' buttons. Cancel closes dialog without picking. Confirm forces pick and adds to picked items.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/interventions/{id}/pick with mismatched product returns {mismatch: true, message: '...'}
Backend: POST /api/interventions/{id}/pick with matching product returns {picked: true}
Backend: POST /api/interventions/{id}/pick with force=true ignores mismatch and proceeds
Backend: Mismatch validation works for partial products (category_id only)
Backend: Mismatch validation works for full products (product_id)
Backend: Pick unavailable instance returns 400 error
Backend: Pick for non-existent intervention returns 404
Frontend Light Picking: Scanning non-conforming serial shows 'Produit non conforme' dialog
Frontend Light Picking: Dialog shows mismatch message with expected vs scanned product
Frontend Light Picking: Dialog shows scanned product description
Frontend Light Picking: 'Non, annuler' button (data-testid='mismatch-cancel') closes dialog without picking
Frontend Light Picking: 'Oui, ajouter' button (data-testid='mismatch-confirm') forces pick
Frontend Light Picking: After force pick, item appears in 'Prélevés cette session' section
Frontend Light Picking: Success toast shows picked product description
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_mismatch_validation.py - Created new test file for mismatch validation feature
seed_data_creation: Created test intervention (MISMATCH-UI-TEST) during UI testing, cleaned up after
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mismatch Validation feature is fully implemented and tested. Key points: 1) POST /api/interventions/{id}/pick validates scanned product against intervention requirements. 2) If mismatch detected, returns {mismatch: true, message, scanned_description, expected_label}. 3) Frontend shows 'Produit non conforme' dialog with data-testid='mismatch-cancel' and data-testid='mismatch-confirm' buttons. 4) Cancel closes dialog without picking. 5) Confirm sends force=true to API and picks the product. 6) Works for both partial (category_id only) and full (product_id) product requirements.

POST /api/interventions/{id}/pick.mismatch_detection: Returns {mismatch: true, message, scanned_description, expected_label} when product doesn't match
POST /api/interventions/{id}/pick.matching_product: Returns {picked: true, instance_id, serial_number, ...} when product matches
POST /api/interventions/{id}/pick.force_parameter: force=true ignores mismatch and proceeds with pick

frontend_mismatch_dialog.title: 'Produit non conforme' with AlertCircle icon
frontend_mismatch_dialog.message: Shows mismatch message: 'Ce produit (X) ne correspond pas à « Y ».'
frontend_mismatch_dialog.question: 'Voulez-vous l'ajouter quand même à cette intervention ?'

confirm_button.action: Sends force=true, picks product, shows in 'Prélevés cette session'

frontend_picked_items.item_display: Shows serial number, product description, location, expiration date
